statement: In every magma, Equation 1900 (`x = (y * (x * y)) * (z * x)`) implies Equation 1966 (`x = (y * (z * x)) * (z * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0144
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op x y)) (op z x))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op z x)) (op z x))
